home.heroDescription: Professional supplier of automotive accessories for global wholesalers, retailers, and online sellers. We provide quality car interior, exterior, lighting, and electronic accessories with stable supply and flexible cooperation.
home.aboutDescription: RICO focuses on supplying quality automotive accessories for wholesalers, retailers, e-commerce sellers, and global distributors. We cooperate with experienced factories to provide stable product supply, competitive pricing, and flexible solutions.

about.description1: RICO focuses on supplying quality automotive accessories for wholesalers, retailers, e-commerce sellers, and global distributors. We cooperate with experienced factories to provide stable product supply, competitive pricing, and flexible solutions.
about.description2: Our product range includes interior accessories, car electronics, lighting systems, exterior styling products, and safety & utility items. We serve clients across 30+ countries with fast shipping and dedicated support.
about.qualityExcellenceDesc: Every product undergoes strict quality inspection before shipment. We ensure consistent quality across all orders.
about.fastDeliveryDesc: Efficient logistics network ensures 7-14 day delivery to major markets worldwide.
about.globalReachDesc: Serving clients across 30+ countries with products tailored to different market requirements.
about.partnershipDesc: Long-term relationships with clients based on trust, transparency, and mutual growth.
about.innovationDesc: We continuously update our product range to match the latest car accessories trends and customer demands.
about.sustainabilityDesc: Eco-friendly packaging and sustainable sourcing practices across our supply chain.
